programme.title: CBS News New York
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a Marine is murdered during training, the NCIS team tracks the suspect deep into the woods and discovers a disturbing secret.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: As Jesse enjoys a day sailing with his daughter, pirates suddenly seize their yacht; the team must quickly locate and rescue Jesse's daughter.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Kevin Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council; Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.); Rep. Jason Crow (D-Colo.); Neel Kashkari, CEO of the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis; Mike Wirth, Chevron CEO.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.desc: News coverage to start the day.

programme.desc: Activist Elizabeth Smart; singer-songwriter Lizzo; immunologist Dr. Tania Elliott; journalist David Begnaud.

programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: CBS News New York 12pm
programme.desc: Midday news update.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Victor makes no apology to Diane; Nikki confronts Lily about her deal with Victor; Billy bargains with Victoria; Jack sets boundaries with Patty.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: The identity of Dylan's mysterious caller is revealed; Liam has a solution for Katie's designer problem.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Bill and Vernon lock horns over Martin; Ashley brings Naomi up to speed on Grayson's stabbing; Kat decides to question Lia about Lynette; Nicole and Leslie have an unpleasant reunion.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After an online acquaintance spends thousands of dollars on a woman in a matter of days, she sues him for harassment; a motorist says a mysterious white car hit his head-on and caused him to back into six vehicles.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Hockey Violence Victim; Float My Houseboat!
programme.desc: Fathers fight over liability after one child causes another's concussion; a man who sold a boat tries to explain the many reasons the title was not in his name.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: What was meant to be a getaway becomes a full-blown fallout: one former friend claims violence and vandalism, while the other argues she was provoked, pushed and shut out; this vacation shows some trips end with baggage no one packed.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: The plaintiff says she lent the defendant money with the promise of repayment from the defendant's cruise gambling winnings; the defendant insists that the plaintiff owes her for hair services and accuses her of defamation.

programme.desc: Evening news coverage.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: The kidnapping survivor who shocked the nation with her bodybuilder career pivot sits down with Eva Pilgrim.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave and Gemma seriously consider a major life change, it sends ripples through the family and strains relationships; wedding chaos and unexpected revelations complicate plans for Malcolm and Marty.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette tries to fix up her run-down car to get it re-registered, Gregg encourages her to buy a new one to save money; Barb tries to teach everyone DMV robbery protocols.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a big city donor is murdered inside her apartment, the team tracks down the young killer who leads them into a crypto scam he's been running with one of his victims, looking to seek revenge on his family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: CIA
programme.desc: When a foreign diplomat is killed after sneaking into the U.S. under unknown circumstances, Colin and Bill discover that a rare mineral with potential to disrupt international relations may be the reason he was targeted.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.
